summary: The user is planning to set up a music room in their garage and seeks advice on soundproofing, organizing instruments, and recording videos. They are considering selling their old Fender Deluxe 90 guitar amp and Yamaha PSR-E263 keyboard, and they plan to record videos of their ukulele playing in the new music room.
facts: The user is setting up a music room in their garage. The user is considering soundproofing their garage for optimal music quality. The user owns a Fender Deluxe 90 guitar amp and is planning to sell it. The user owns a Yamaha PSR-E263 keyboard and is contemplating selling it. The user has a Kala KA-CE15S ukulele and plans to record videos of their playing. The user is interested in recording a cover song for their first video. The user is using their phone's camera to record videos. The user has been playing their ukulele a lot lately. The user is looking for tips on organizing their instruments and equipment in the music room. The user is considering investing in shelves and cabinets for their music room organization.
